---
pagetitle: "CleanSpeX"
engine: knitr
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>
          h1.title { display: none !important; }
          body iframe {
            width: 100% !important;
            min-height: 500px;
            transition: height .15s ease-out;
            display: block;
          }
          @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
            html, body,
            body .quarto-container, body main, body #quarto-content,
            body .page-layout-full, body .container-fluid, body .container,
            body #quarto-document-content, body .content,
            body .cell, body .cell-output-display,
            body .shinylive-wrapper, body iframe, body .bslib-page-fill {
              background-color: #141A13 !important;
              background: #141A13 !important;
              color: #D8E8D5 !important;
            }
            body .cell, body .cell-output-display, body .shinylive-wrapper {
              padding: 0 !important; margin: 0 !important; border: none !important;
            }
            body iframe { border: none !important; outline: none !important; }
            body .navbar { background-color: #1E261D !important; }
            body .navbar * { color: #A8C5A0 !important; }
          }
        </style>
        <script>
          document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
            document.querySelectorAll('iframe').forEach(function(f) {
              f.style.background = 'transparent';
            });
          });
          window.addEventListener('message', function(event) {
            if (event.data && event.data.type === 'cleanspex-resize') {
              document.querySelectorAll('iframe').forEach(function(f) {
                if (f.contentWindow === event.source)
                  f.style.height = event.data.height + 'px';
              });
            }
          });
        </script>
filters:
  - shinylive
---

```{shinylive-r}
#| standalone: true
#| viewerHeight: 500
#| viewerWidth: "100%"

suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(shiny))
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(bslib))

# ── Palette ggsci npg (alpha 0.8) ────────────────────────────────────────────
PAL_NPG <- adjustcolor(c("#E64B35","#4DBBD5","#00A087","#3C5488","#F39B7F",
                          "#8491B4","#91D1C2","#DC0000","#7E6148","#B09C85"),
                        alpha.f = 0.8)

# ── Dizionario bilingue ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
TR <- list(
  it = list(
    app_subtitle   = "Pulizia e visualizzazione dati da",
    privacy_title  = "100% locale — i tuoi dati non lasciano mai il browser",
    privacy_body   = "Questa applicazione gira interamente nel tuo browser grazie a WebR. Nessun dato viene inviato a server esterni: il file che carichi viene elaborato solo sul tuo dispositivo.",
    status_waiting = "In attesa", status_loaded = "✓ File caricato",
    status_clean   = "✓ File pulito", status_chart = "✓ Grafico pronto",
    status_error   = "✗ Errore",
    step1          = "1 — Carica il file",
    file_ph        = "Seleziona un CSV esportato da PlantEye…",
    file_btn       = "Sfoglia",
    file_info      = function(nr, np, nt, nd) paste0(nr, " misure · ", np, " piante · ", nt, " trattamenti · ", nd, " giorni"),
    step2          = "2 — Parametri da includere",
    sel_main       = "Solo parametri principali",
    sel_all        = "Tutti (+ distribuzioni %)",
    desel_all      = "Deseleziona tutte",
    col_meta       = "parametri selezionati",
    step3          = "3 — Elabora e scarica",
    btn_process    = "Elabora",
    btn_dl_clean   = "Scarica CSV pulito",
    stat_plants    = "piante", stat_trts = "trattamenti",
    stat_days      = "giorni", stat_params = "parametri",
    stat_file      = "file",
    step4          = "4 — Mappa spaziale del bench",
    map_hint       = "Clicca sui vasi per escluderli dall'analisi (diventano grigi). Clicca di nuovo per riselezionarli.",
    map_selected   = "selezionati",
    map_excluded   = "esclusi",
    btn_sel_all    = "Seleziona tutti",
    btn_desel_all  = "Deseleziona tutti",
    step5          = "5 — Grafico temporale",
    chart_hint     = "Media giornaliera ± SE tra piante dello stesso trattamento (scansioni aggregate per giorno). Solo i vasi selezionati nella mappa vengono inclusi.",
    chart_ylab     = "Valore medio",
    chart_param_lbl= "Parametri da visualizzare:",
    ribbon_label   = "Mostra banda ±SE",
    ribbon_sub     = "Visualizza l'area di confidenza attorno alla curva media",
    range_hint     = "Trascina i cursori per restringere l'intervallo di date visualizzato (di default tutto il periodo).",
    range_start    = "Data inizio",
    range_end      = "Data fine",
    btn_chart      = "Genera grafico",
    btn_dl_png     = "Scarica PNG",
    btn_clear      = "Cancella grafico",
    chart_no_trt   = "Seleziona almeno un vaso nella mappa per generare il grafico.",
    box_title      = "5b — Boxplot su data singola",
    box_hint       = "Seleziona un singolo giorno di scansione per visualizzare la distribuzione dei valori tra i vasi di ogni trattamento.",
    box_date_lbl   = "Seleziona data",
    btn_box_chart  = "Genera boxplot",
    jitter_label   = "Mostra punti individuali (jitter)",
    jitter_sub     = "Visualizza ogni singola misura come puntino, utile per individuare outlier",
    btn_dl_box     = "Scarica PNG",
    btn_clear_box  = "Cancella boxplot",
    step6          = "6 — Export finale",
    pivot_label    = "Formato long (parametri in una colonna)",
    pivot_sub      = "Ogni riga avrà un parametro e il suo valore, invece di una colonna per parametro",
    btn_final      = "Genera file finale",
    btn_dl_final   = "Scarica CSV finale",
    stat_rows      = "righe", stat_format = "formato",
    final_preview  = "Anteprima file finale",
    credits        = list(pre="Applicazione creata da ", bug=" · Segnala problemi su ", or=" o via ", mail="mail")
  ),
  en = list(
    app_subtitle   = "Data cleaning and visualisation from",
    privacy_title  = "100% local — your data never leaves the browser",
    privacy_body   = "This application runs entirely in your browser using WebR. No data is sent to external servers: the file you upload is processed only on your device.",
    status_waiting = "Waiting", status_loaded = "✓ File loaded",
    status_clean   = "✓ File cleaned", status_chart = "✓ Chart ready",
    status_error   = "✗ Error",
    step1          = "1 — Load file",
    file_ph        = "Select a CSV exported from PlantEye…",
    file_btn       = "Browse",
    file_info      = function(nr, np, nt, nd) paste0(nr, " measurements · ", np, " plants · ", nt, " treatments · ", nd, " days"),
    step2          = "2 — Parameters to include",
    sel_main       = "Main parameters only",
    sel_all        = "All (+ distributions %)",
    desel_all      = "Deselect all",
    col_meta       = "parameters selected",
    step3          = "3 — Process and download",
    btn_process    = "Process",
    btn_dl_clean   = "Download cleaned CSV",
    stat_plants    = "plants", stat_trts = "treatments",
    stat_days      = "days", stat_params = "parameters",
    stat_file      = "file",
    step4          = "4 — Bench spatial map",
    map_hint       = "Click pots to exclude them from the analysis (they turn grey). Click again to re-include.",
    map_selected   = "selected",
    map_excluded   = "excluded",
    btn_sel_all    = "Select all",
    btn_desel_all  = "Deselect all",
    step5          = "5 — Time-series chart",
    chart_hint     = "Daily mean ± SE across plants of the same treatment (scans aggregated per day). Only pots selected in the map are included.",
    chart_ylab     = "Mean value",
    chart_param_lbl= "Parameters to display:",
    ribbon_label   = "Show ±SE ribbon",
    ribbon_sub     = "Display the confidence band around the mean curve",
    range_hint     = "Drag the sliders to restrict the date range shown (default: full period).",
    range_start    = "Start date",
    range_end      = "End date",
    btn_chart      = "Generate chart",
    btn_dl_png     = "Download PNG",
    btn_clear      = "Clear chart",
    chart_no_trt   = "Select at least one pot in the map to generate the chart.",
    box_title      = "5b — Boxplot for a single date",
    box_hint       = "Select a single scan day to display the distribution of values across pots for each treatment.",
    box_date_lbl   = "Select date",
    btn_box_chart  = "Generate boxplot",
    jitter_label   = "Show individual data points (jitter)",
    jitter_sub     = "Overlay each measurement as a dot, useful to spot outliers",
    btn_dl_box     = "Download PNG",
    btn_clear_box  = "Clear boxplot",
    step6          = "6 — Final export",
    pivot_label    = "Long format (parameters in one column)",
    pivot_sub      = "Each row will have one parameter and its value, instead of one column per parameter",
    btn_final      = "Generate final file",
    btn_dl_final   = "Download final CSV",
    stat_rows      = "rows", stat_format = "format",
    final_preview  = "Final file preview",
    credits        = list(pre="Application developed by ", bug=" · Report issues on ", or=" or via ", mail="email")
  )
)

# ── Parsing PlantEye ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
parse_planteye <- function(filepath) {
  df <- read.csv(filepath, check.names = FALSE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE,
                 encoding = "UTF-8")
  df$date <- as.Date(substr(df$timestamp, 1, 10))
  df$posX <- as.integer(sapply(strsplit(df$unit, ":"), `[`, 2))
  df$posY <- as.integer(sapply(strsplit(df$unit, ":"), `[`, 3))
  df
}

# ── Classificazione parametri ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
classify_params <- function(df) {
  meta   <- c("unit","timestamp","sensor","genotype","g_alias","treatment",
               "date","posX","posY")
  all_p  <- setdiff(colnames(df), meta)
  is_dist <- grepl("\\[.+\\]", all_p)
  list(main = all_p[!is_dist], dist = all_p[is_dist], all = all_p)
}

# ── Aggregazione giornaliera per pianta ───────────────────────────────────────
daily_mean_per_plant <- function(df, params) {
  id_cols <- c("unit","date","treatment","posX","posY","genotype","sensor")
  id_cols <- id_cols[id_cols %in% colnames(df)]
  keep    <- c(id_cols, params)
  sub     <- df[, keep[keep %in% colnames(df)], drop = FALSE]
  for (p in params) sub[[p]] <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(sub[[p]]))
  agg <- aggregate(sub[, params, drop=FALSE],
                   by = sub[, id_cols, drop=FALSE],
                   FUN = mean, na.rm = TRUE)
  agg
}

# ── Aggregazione media±SE per trattamento × giorno ───────────────────────────
agg_trt_day <- function(daily_df, params, selected_units) {
  sub <- daily_df[daily_df$unit %in% selected_units, , drop = FALSE]
  if (!nrow(sub)) return(NULL)
  result <- list()
  for (p in params) {
    vals <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(sub[[p]]))
    tmp  <- sub; tmp$val <- vals
    m    <- aggregate(val ~ date + treatment, data = tmp, FUN = mean, na.rm = TRUE)
    s    <- aggregate(val ~ date + treatment, data = tmp, FUN = function(x) {
      n <- sum(!is.na(x)); if (n < 2) 0 else sd(x, na.rm=TRUE)/sqrt(n)
    })
    names(m)[3] <- "mean"; names(s)[3] <- "se"
    merged <- merge(m, s, by = c("date","treatment"))
    merged$param <- p
    result[[p]] <- merged
  }
  do.call(rbind, result)
}

# ── Colori trattamento (palette npg condivisa) ────────────────────────────────
make_trt_colors <- function(treatments) {
  trts <- sort(unique(as.character(treatments)))
  setNames(PAL_NPG[seq_along(trts)], trts)
}

# ── Generazione SVG mappa bench ──────────────────────────────────────────────
make_bench_svg <- function(map_df, trt_colors, selected_units,
                            cell_w = 60, cell_h = 60,
                            pad_x = 52, pad_y = 44, legend_h = 40,
                            is_dark = FALSE) {
  fg     <- if (is_dark) "#D8E8D5" else "#374151"
  bg     <- if (is_dark) "#1E261D" else "#FFFFFF"
  n_col  <- max(map_df$posX)
  n_row  <- max(map_df$posY)
  svg_w  <- n_col * cell_w + pad_x * 2
  svg_h  <- n_row * cell_h + pad_y + 16 + legend_h + 24
  rx     <- 10

  cells <- character(0)
  # Etichette assi
  for (x in seq_len(n_col)) {
    cx <- pad_x + (x-1)*cell_w + cell_w/2
    cells <- c(cells, sprintf(
      '<text x="%.0f" y="%.0f" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" fill="%s" font-family="system-ui">%d</text>',
      cx, pad_y - 8, fg, x))
  }
  for (y in seq_len(n_row)) {
    cy <- pad_y + (y-1)*cell_h + cell_h/2 + 4
    cells <- c(cells, sprintf(
      '<text x="%.0f" y="%.0f" text-anchor="end" font-size="11" fill="%s" font-family="system-ui">%d</text>',
      pad_x - 6, cy, fg, y))
  }

  # Vasi
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(map_df))) {
    uid  <- map_df$unit[i]
    trt  <- map_df$treatment[i]
    sel  <- uid %in% selected_units
    col  <- trt_colors[trt]
    fill <- if (sel) col else "#D1D5DB"
    strk <- if (sel) col else "#9CA3AF"
    sdark_fill <- if (sel) col else "#4A5568"
    sdark_strk <- if (sel) col else "#718096"
    x_svg <- pad_x + (map_df$posX[i]-1)*cell_w + 3
    y_svg <- pad_y + (map_df$posY[i]-1)*cell_h + 3
    safe_id <- gsub(":", "_", uid)
    cells <- c(cells, sprintf(
      '<rect class="vaso%s" id="v_%s" x="%.0f" y="%.0f" width="%.0f" height="%.0f"
       rx="%d" fill="%s" stroke="%s" stroke-width="2.5" style="cursor:pointer;transition:all .12s;"
       onclick="toggleVaso(\'%s\')"
       data-unit="%s" data-trt="%s" data-sel="%s">
         <title>%s&#10;%s</title>
       </rect>',
      if (sel) " sel" else " excl",
      safe_id, x_svg, y_svg, cell_w-6, cell_h-6,
      rx, fill, strk,
      safe_id, uid, trt, if (sel) "1" else "0",
      uid, trt))
    # Mini etichetta unit
    cells <- c(cells, sprintf(
      '<text x="%.0f" y="%.0f" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11"
       fill="%s" font-family="system-ui" style="pointer-events:none;font-weight:600;">%s</text>',
      x_svg + (cell_w-6)/2, y_svg + (cell_h-6)/2 + 4,
      if (sel) "#FFFFFF" else "#9CA3AF",
      uid))
  }

  # Legenda trattamenti
  trts    <- names(trt_colors)
  item_w  <- 115
  total_w <- length(trts) * item_w
  lx0     <- max(4, (svg_w - total_w) / 2)
  ly      <- pad_y + n_row * cell_h + 14
  for (i in seq_along(trts)) {
    col <- trt_colors[trts[i]]
    lx  <- lx0 + (i-1)*item_w
    cells <- c(cells, sprintf(
      '<rect x="%.0f" y="%.0f" width="14" height="14" rx="3" fill="%s"/>
       <text x="%.0f" y="%.0f" font-size="13" font-weight="600" fill="%s" font-family="system-ui">%s</text>',
      lx, ly, col, lx+20, ly+11, fg, trts[i]))
  }

  sprintf('<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 %d %d" width="100%%" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet" style="background:%s;border-radius:8px;display:block;">%s</svg>',
          svg_w, svg_h + 4, bg, paste(cells, collapse=""))
}

# ── Grafico temporale ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
draw_time_chart <- function(trt_day_df, params, trt_colors, show_ribbon = TRUE,
                             ylab = "Mean value") {
  n_p   <- length(params)
  n_col <- 2; n_row <- ceiling(n_p / n_col)
  par(bg="#FFFFFF", col.axis="#1A1A1A", col.lab="#1A1A1A", col.main="#1A1A1A",
      fg="#1A1A1A", font.main=2, cex.main=1.35, cex.lab=1.2, cex.axis=1.1)
  if (n_p > 1) {
    par(mfrow=c(n_row, n_col), mar=c(7.5, 6, 3, 1.5), mgp=c(4, 0.9, 0))
  } else {
    par(mfrow=c(1,1), mar=c(7.5, 6, 3, 1.5), mgp=c(4, 0.9, 0))
  }

  trts      <- intersect(names(trt_colors), unique(trt_day_df$treatment))
  trts      <- trts[order(trts)]
  all_dates <- sort(unique(trt_day_df$date))
  date_ticks <- seq(min(all_dates), max(all_dates), by = 7)

  for (p in params) {
    sub <- trt_day_df[trt_day_df$param == p, , drop=FALSE]
    if (!nrow(sub)) next

    ylim <- range(sub$mean + sub$se, sub$mean - sub$se, na.rm=TRUE)
    ylim[1] <- max(0, ylim[1])
    ylim <- ylim + diff(ylim) * c(-0.05, 0.08)

    p_clean <- gsub("\\s*$", "", p)
    last_tok <- regmatches(p_clean, regexpr("[^ ]+$", p_clean))
    unit_m <- if (length(last_tok) && !grepl("^[[:digit:]%\\[]", last_tok)) last_tok else ""

    plot.new()
    plot.window(xlim=range(all_dates), ylim=ylim)
    rect(par("usr")[1], par("usr")[3], par("usr")[2], par("usr")[4],
         col="#FFFFFF", border=NA)
    abline(h=pretty(ylim), col="#E5E5E5", lwd=0.9)
    abline(v=date_ticks, col="#F0F0F0", lwd=0.7)

    for (trt in trts) {
      d <- sub[sub$treatment==trt, ]
      if (!nrow(d)) next
      d <- d[order(d$date),]
      col <- trt_colors[trt]
      if (show_ribbon) {
        rib_col <- adjustcolor(col, alpha.f=0.18)
        polygon(c(d$date, rev(d$date)),
                c(d$mean + d$se, rev(pmax(d$mean - d$se, 0))),
                col=rib_col, border=NA)
      }
      lines(d$date, d$mean, col=col, lwd=2.2)
    }

    axis(2, las=1, cex.axis=1.1, col="#1A1A1A", col.axis="#1A1A1A",
         mgp=c(4, 0.9, 0))
    box(col="#1A1A1A", lwd=1)

    # Etichette asse X ruotate di 30 gradi
    usr <- par("usr")
    y_off <- (usr[4] - usr[3]) * 0.03
    text(x=date_ticks, y=usr[3] - y_off,
         labels=format(date_ticks, "%d %b"),
         srt=30, adj=c(1,1), xpd=TRUE, cex=1.0, col="#1A1A1A")

    # Asse Y: nome parametro + unità
    ylab_full <- if (nchar(unit_m) > 0) paste0(ylab, " [", trimws(unit_m), "]") else ylab
    title(main=p, col.main="#1A1A1A")
    title(ylab=ylab_full, col.lab="#1A1A1A")

    # Legenda solo nel primo pannello, testo e simboli più grandi
    if (p == params[1]) {
      legend("topleft", legend=trts, col=trt_colors[trts], lwd=2.5,
             bty="n", cex=1.05, pt.cex=1.5)
    }
  }
  par(mfrow=c(1,1))
}

# ── Boxplot per data singola ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
draw_boxplot_day <- function(daily_df, params, trt_colors, selected_date,
                              ylab = "Value", show_jitter = FALSE) {
  sub <- daily_df[daily_df$date == selected_date, , drop = FALSE]
  if (!nrow(sub)) return(invisible(NULL))

  n_p   <- length(params)
  n_col <- 2; n_row <- ceiling(n_p / n_col)
  par(bg="#FFFFFF", col.axis="#1A1A1A", col.lab="#1A1A1A", col.main="#1A1A1A",
      fg="#1A1A1A", font.main=2, cex.main=1.3, cex.lab=1.2, cex.axis=1.1)
  if (n_p > 1) {
    par(mfrow=c(n_row, n_col), mar=c(7, 6, 3.5, 1.5), mgp=c(4, 0.9, 0))
  } else {
    par(mfrow=c(1,1), mar=c(7, 6, 3.5, 1.5), mgp=c(4, 0.9, 0))
  }
  trts <- intersect(names(trt_colors), unique(sub$treatment))
  trts <- trts[order(trts)]

  for (p in params) {
    vals <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(sub[[p]]))
    sub$val <- vals
    bp_data <- lapply(trts, function(trt) {
      v <- sub$val[sub$treatment == trt]
      v[!is.na(v)]
    })
    names(bp_data) <- trts
    non_empty <- sapply(bp_data, length) > 0
    bp_data <- bp_data[non_empty]
    cols    <- trt_colors[names(bp_data)]

    p_clean  <- gsub("\\s*$", "", p)
    last_tok <- regmatches(p_clean, regexpr("[^ ]+$", p_clean))
    unit_m   <- if (length(last_tok) && !grepl("^[[:digit:]%\\[]", last_tok)) last_tok else ""
    ylab_full <- if (nchar(unit_m) > 0) paste0(ylab, " [", trimws(unit_m), "]") else ylab

    all_vals <- unlist(bp_data); all_vals <- all_vals[!is.na(all_vals)]
    ylim <- if (length(all_vals)) range(all_vals) * c(0.95, 1.05) else c(0,1)

    plot.new()
    plot.window(xlim=c(0.5, length(bp_data)+0.5), ylim=ylim)
    rect(par("usr")[1], par("usr")[3], par("usr")[2], par("usr")[4],
         col="#FFFFFF", border=NA)
    y_major <- pretty(ylim)
    y_major <- y_major[y_major >= ylim[1] & y_major <= ylim[2]]
    abline(h=y_major, col="#E5E5E5", lwd=0.9)

    bp_pos <- seq_along(bp_data)
    boxplot(bp_data, add=TRUE, at=bp_pos, col=cols,
            border="#1A1A1A", lwd=1, axes=FALSE,
            outline=TRUE, pch=19, cex=0.6,
            whisklty=1, staplelwd=1.2, boxwex=0.55)

    if (show_jitter) {
      for (j in seq_along(bp_data)) {
        vals_j <- bp_data[[j]]
        if (!length(vals_j)) next
        jx <- bp_pos[j] + runif(length(vals_j), -0.18, 0.18)
        points(jx, vals_j, pch=21,
               bg=adjustcolor("#1A1A1A", alpha.f=0.35),
               col=adjustcolor("#1A1A1A", alpha.f=0.55),
               cex=0.85, lwd=0.6)
      }
    }

    usr <- par("usr")
    y_off <- (usr[4] - usr[3]) * 0.04
    text(x=bp_pos, y=usr[3] - y_off, labels=names(bp_data),
         srt=30, adj=c(1,1), xpd=TRUE, cex=0.95, col="#1A1A1A")

    axis(2, at=y_major, col="#1A1A1A", col.axis="#1A1A1A", cex.axis=1.1,
         las=1, mgp=c(4,0.9,0))
    box(col="#1A1A1A", lwd=1)
    title(main=paste0(p, "  [", format(selected_date, "%d %b %Y"), "]"),
          col.main="#1A1A1A")
    title(ylab=ylab_full, col.lab="#1A1A1A")
  }
  par(mfrow=c(1,1))
}

# ── Pivot long ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
pivot_long_pe <- function(df, params) {
  id_cols    <- c("unit","timestamp","date","treatment","sensor","genotype","posX","posY")
  id_present <- id_cols[id_cols %in% colnames(df)]
  id_data    <- df[, id_present, drop=FALSE]
  long_rows  <- do.call(rbind, lapply(params, function(p) {
    tmp <- id_data; tmp$parameter <- p; tmp$value <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(df[[p]])); tmp
  }))
  long_rows[order(rep(seq_len(nrow(df)), length(params))),]
}

# ── Base64 encoder ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
base64_encode_raw <- function(raw_bytes) {
  alphabet <- strsplit("ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZabcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz0123456789+/","")[[1]]
  n <- length(raw_bytes); pad <- (3-n%%3)%%3
  if (pad>0) raw_bytes <- c(raw_bytes, raw(pad))
  m   <- matrix(as.integer(raw_bytes), nrow=3)
  idx <- rbind(bitwShiftR(m[1,],2),
               bitwOr(bitwShiftL(bitwAnd(m[1,],3L),4), bitwShiftR(m[2,],4)),
               bitwOr(bitwShiftL(bitwAnd(m[2,],15L),2), bitwShiftR(m[3,],6)),
               bitwAnd(m[3,],63L))
  out <- matrix(alphabet[idx+1], nrow=4)
  if (pad>=1) out[4,ncol(out)] <- "="
  if (pad==2) out[3,ncol(out)] <- "="
  paste(out, collapse="")
}

# ── Serializza vettore R in array JS (per slider date) ───────────────────────
jsonlite_like_array_r <- function(x) {
  esc <- gsub('"', '\\\\"', as.character(x))
  paste0("[", paste0('"', esc, '"', collapse=","), "]")
}

df_to_csv_string <- function(df, sep=",") {
  con <- textConnection("out","w"); write.table(df, con, sep=sep, row.names=FALSE, quote=FALSE, na="")
  close(con); paste(out, collapse="\n")
}

get_available_chart_params <- function(df, selected_params) {
  cand <- selected_params[selected_params %in% colnames(df)]
  cand[vapply(cand, function(c) !all(is.na(suppressWarnings(as.numeric(df[[c]])))), logical(1))]
}

# ── UI ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ui <- page_fluid(
  title = "CleanSpeX 🧹",
  theme = bs_theme(version=5, base_font="system-ui", heading_font="system-ui",
                   bg="#F7F9F7", fg="#1A1D23", primary="#2D6A4F",
                   secondary="#B7D4C6", border_radius="6px"),

  tags$head(tags$style(HTML("
    html, body { padding:1rem 1.5rem !important; margin:0 !important; background:#F7F9F7 !important; }
    @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { html, body { background:#141A13 !important; color:#D8E8D5 !important; } }
    h1.title { display:none !important; }
    .sx-card { background:#fff; border:1px solid #E2E6EA; border-radius:10px; padding:1.8rem 2.2rem; margin-bottom:1.4rem; box-shadow:0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,.06); }
    .privacy-banner { background:#F0F9FF; border:1px solid #BAE6FD; border-radius:10px; padding:1rem 1.4rem; margin-bottom:1.4rem; display:flex; align-items:flex-start; gap:.9rem; }
    .privacy-icon { font-size:1.3rem; flex-shrink:0; line-height:1.5; }
    .privacy-title { font-size:.82rem; font-weight:700; color:#0C4A6E; margin-bottom:.2rem; letter-spacing:.03em; text-transform:uppercase; }
    .privacy-body  { font-size:.82rem; color:#075985; margin:0; line-height:1.55; }
    .app-title    { font-size:1.6rem; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:-.3px; color:#1A1D23; margin-bottom:.2rem; }
    .app-subtitle { font-size:.95rem; color:#6B7280; margin-bottom:0; }
    .section-label { font-size:.8rem; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:.07em; text-transform:uppercase; color:#6B7280; margin-bottom:.8rem; }
    .section-divider { border:none; border-top:1px dashed #D1D5DB; margin:1.4rem 0; }
    .lang-switcher { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; border:1.5px solid #D1D5DB; border-radius:6px; overflow:hidden; font-size:.85rem; font-weight:700; }
    .lang-btn { padding:.35rem .8rem; cursor:pointer; background:#fff; color:#6B7280; border:none; border-right:1px solid #D1D5DB; transition:all .12s; user-select:none; }
    .lang-btn:last-child { border-right:none; }
    .lang-btn.active { background:#2D6A4F; color:#fff; }
    .lang-btn:hover:not(.active) { background:#F3F4F6; }
    .badge-idle  { background:#E9ECF0; color:#4B5563; }
    .badge-ok    { background:#D1FAE5; color:#065F46; }
    .badge-error { background:#FEE2E2; color:#991B1B; }
    .status-badge { display:inline-block; font-size:.85rem; font-weight:600; padding:.3em .85em; border-radius:999px; }
    .col-grid { display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:.5rem; margin-bottom:.9rem; }
    .col-toggle { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:.35rem; padding:.38rem .85rem; border-radius:999px; border:1.5px solid #D1D5DB; background:#fff; font-size:.85rem; font-weight:500; color:#374151; cursor:pointer; transition:all .12s; user-select:none; }
    .col-toggle.active  { border-color:#2D6A4F; background:#EAF4EF; color:#1C4430; }
    .col-toggle.active::before { content:'✓'; font-size:.78rem; color:#2D6A4F; font-weight:700; }
    .col-toggle.excluded { border-color:#D1D5DB; background:#F9FAFB; color:#9CA3AF; text-decoration:line-through; }
    .col-toggle.dist { border-style:dashed; }
    .toggle-actions { display:flex; gap:.7rem; margin-bottom:.8rem; flex-wrap:wrap; }
    .link-btn { background:none; border:none; padding:0; font-size:.85rem; color:#2D6A4F; font-weight:600; cursor:pointer; text-decoration:underline; }
    .link-btn:hover { color:#1C4430; }
    #clean_btn, #pivot_btn { border:none; color:#fff; font-weight:600; font-size:1rem; padding:.6rem 1.7rem; border-radius:6px; transition:background .15s; }
    #clean_btn { background:#2D6A4F; } #clean_btn:hover { background:#245740; }
    #pivot_btn { background:#7C3AED; } #pivot_btn:hover { background:#6D28D9; }
    #chart_btn { border:none; color:#fff; font-weight:700; font-size:.95rem; padding:.58rem 1.6rem; border-radius:6px; background:#0E7490; transition:background .15s; }
    #chart_btn:hover { background:#0C5E76; }
    .dl-wrap .btn { border:1.5px solid #2D6A4F; color:#2D6A4F; background:transparent; font-weight:600; font-size:1rem; padding:.6rem 1.7rem; border-radius:6px; transition:all .15s; }
    .dl-wrap .btn:hover { background:#EAF4EF; }
    .stats-strip { display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:2rem; padding:1rem 1.4rem; background:#F0FBF5; border-radius:6px; border:1px solid #C6E8D6; margin-bottom:1.4rem; }
    .stat-item { display:flex; flex-direction:column; }
    .stat-val  { font-size:1.4rem; font-weight:700; color:#2D6A4F; line-height:1; }
    .stat-lbl  { font-size:.78rem; color:#6B7280; margin-top:.25rem; }
    .preview-wrap { overflow-x:auto; overflow-y:auto; max-height:320px; border-radius:6px; border:1px solid #E2E6EA; }
    .preview-wrap thead th { background:#F3F4F6; font-weight:700; color:#374151; border-bottom:2px solid #D1D5DB; padding:.55rem .8rem; position:sticky; top:0; z-index:1; }
    .preview-wrap table { font-size:.88rem !important; margin-bottom:0; white-space:nowrap; }
    .preview-wrap tbody td { padding:.45rem .8rem; color:#4B5563; border-bottom:1px solid #F0F1F3; }
    .map-wrap { width:100%; max-width:900px; margin:0 auto; padding:.5rem 0; }
    .map-hint { font-size:.82rem; color:#6B7280; margin-bottom:.8rem; }
    .map-stats { display:flex; gap:1.5rem; margin-top:.8rem; font-size:.85rem; }
    .map-stat-sel  { color:#2D6A4F; font-weight:600; }
    .map-stat-excl { color:#9CA3AF; }
    .pivot-toggle { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:.85rem; padding:1rem 1.2rem; border-radius:8px; border:1.5px solid #E2E6EA; background:#FAFAFA; margin-bottom:1.2rem; cursor:pointer; transition:all .12s; }
    .pivot-toggle:hover { border-color:#7C3AED; background:#F5F3FF; }
    .pivot-toggle.on    { border-color:#7C3AED; background:#F5F3FF; }
    .pivot-switch { width:2.6rem; height:1.4rem; border-radius:999px; background:#D1D5DB; position:relative; flex-shrink:0; transition:background .15s; }
    .pivot-toggle.on .pivot-switch { background:#7C3AED; }
    .pivot-switch::after { content:''; position:absolute; top:.18rem; left:.18rem; width:1.04rem; height:1.04rem; border-radius:50%; background:#fff; transition:left .15s; }
    .pivot-toggle.on .pivot-switch::after { left:1.38rem; }
    .pivot-label { font-size:.95rem; font-weight:600; color:#374151; }
    .pivot-sub   { font-size:.82rem; color:#6B7280; margin-top:.15rem; }
    .chart-param-grid { display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:.5rem; margin-bottom:1rem; }
    .chart-param-toggle { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:.4rem; padding:.4rem .9rem; border-radius:999px; border:1.5px solid #C5D4C2; background:#fff; font-size:.85rem; font-weight:500; color:#374151; cursor:pointer; transition:all .12s; user-select:none; }
    .chart-param-toggle.active { border-color:#0E7490; background:#E0F4F8; color:#0C4A5C; }
    .chart-param-toggle.active::before { content:'✓'; font-size:.76rem; color:#0E7490; font-weight:700; }
    .chart-param-toggle.excluded { border-color:#DDE5DB; background:#F9FAF9; color:#9CA3AF; }
    .chart-wrap { background:#fff; border-radius:6px; border:1px solid #E2E6EA; padding:1rem; margin-top:1rem; }
    .chart-wrap img { width:100%; height:auto; display:block; border-radius:4px; }
    /* ── dark mode ── */
    body.dark, body.dark html { background:#141A13 !important; color:#D8E8D5 !important; }
    body.dark .sx-card { background:#1E261D; border-color:#334430; }
    body.dark .app-title { color:#E8F4E5; }
    body.dark .app-subtitle { color:#7A9975; }
    body.dark .section-label { color:#7A9975; }
    body.dark .section-divider { border-color:#334430; }
    body.dark .badge-idle  { background:#253023; color:#7A9975; }
    body.dark .badge-ok    { background:#1A3D22; color:#6FCF7F; }
    body.dark .badge-error { background:#3D1A1A; color:#F87171; }
    body.dark .lang-switcher { border-color:#334430; }
    body.dark .lang-btn { background:#1E261D; color:#7A9975; border-color:#334430; }
    body.dark .lang-btn.active { background:#3A6B35; color:#fff; }
    body.dark .lang-btn:hover:not(.active) { background:#253023; color:#D8E8D5; }
    body.dark .privacy-banner { background:#1A2D1A; border-color:#2A4A2A; }
    body.dark .privacy-title { color:#6FCF7F; }
    body.dark .privacy-body  { color:#7A9975; }
    body.dark .col-toggle { background:#1E261D; border-color:#334430; color:#C5D8C2; }
    body.dark .col-toggle.active { border-color:#5A9B55; background:#1E3A1A; color:#A8E0A0; }
    body.dark .col-toggle.excluded { background:#161E15; color:#4A5E47; }
    body.dark .link-btn { color:#6FCF7F; }
    body.dark #clean_btn { background:#3A6B35; }
    body.dark #chart_btn { background:#0E7490; }
    body.dark .dl-wrap .btn { border-color:#5A9B55; color:#6FCF7F; }
    body.dark .dl-wrap .btn:hover { background:#1E3A1A; }
    body.dark .stats-strip { background:#1A2D1A; border-color:#2A4A2A; }
    body.dark .stat-val { color:#6FCF7F; }
    body.dark .stat-lbl { color:#7A9975; }
    body.dark .preview-wrap { border-color:#334430; background:#1E261D; }
    body.dark .preview-wrap thead th { background:#253023; color:#C5D8C2; border-color:#334430; }
    body.dark .preview-wrap tbody td { background:#1E261D; color:#B8D0B5; border-color:#2A3528; }
    body.dark .map-hint { color:#7A9975; }
    body.dark .map-stat-sel  { color:#6FCF7F; }
    body.dark .map-stat-excl { color:#5A6B58; }
    body.dark .pivot-toggle { background:#1E261D; border-color:#334430; }
    body.dark .pivot-toggle:hover, body.dark .pivot-toggle.on { border-color:#7C3AED; background:#1E1A2D; }
    body.dark .pivot-switch { background:#334430; }
    body.dark .pivot-label { color:#D8E8D5; }
    body.dark .pivot-sub   { color:#7A9975; }
    body.dark .chart-param-toggle { background:#1E261D; border-color:#334430; color:#C5D8C2; }
    body.dark .chart-param-toggle.active { border-color:#22B8CF; background:#122A30; color:#67E8F9; }
    body.dark .chart-param-toggle.excluded { background:#161E15; color:#4A5E47; }
    body.dark .chart-wrap { background:#1E261D; border-color:#334430; }
    body.dark .shiny-table-output table, body.dark table.table, body.dark table { background:#1E261D !important; color:#B8D0B5 !important; }
    body.dark table.table > :not(caption) > * > * { background:#1E261D !important; color:#B8D0B5 !important; }
    body.dark .form-control, body.dark input[type=text] { background:#253023 !important; border-color:#334430 !important; color:#D8E8D5 !important; }
  "))),

  tags$script(HTML("
    (function() {
      function sendHeight() {
        var h = document.body.scrollHeight;
        window.parent.postMessage({type:'cleanspex-resize', height:h}, '*');
      }
      var ro = new ResizeObserver(function() { sendHeight(); });
      ro.observe(document.body);
      var mo = new MutationObserver(function() { sendHeight(); });
      mo.observe(document.body, {childList:true, subtree:true, attributes:true});
      sendHeight();
      [100,300,600,1000,2000].forEach(function(ms){ setTimeout(sendHeight,ms); });
    })();

    (function() {
      var mq = window.matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)');
      function applyDark(on) { document.body.classList.toggle('dark', on); }
      applyDark(mq.matches);
      mq.addEventListener('change', function(e) { applyDark(e.matches); });
    })();

    function setLang(lang) {
      document.querySelectorAll('.lang-btn').forEach(function(b) {
        b.classList.toggle('active', b.getAttribute('data-lang')===lang);
      });
      Shiny.setInputValue('ui_lang', lang, {priority:'event'});
    }

    function toggleCol(el) {
      el.classList.toggle('active'); el.classList.toggle('excluded');
      updateColMeta();
    }
    function setAllCols(mode) {
      if (mode==='main') {
        document.querySelectorAll('.col-toggle').forEach(function(el) {
          var isDist = el.classList.contains('dist');
          el.classList.toggle('active', !isDist);
          el.classList.toggle('excluded', isDist);
        });
      } else if (mode==='all') {
        document.querySelectorAll('.col-toggle').forEach(function(el) {
          el.classList.add('active'); el.classList.remove('excluded');
        });
      } else {
        document.querySelectorAll('.col-toggle').forEach(function(el) {
          el.classList.remove('active'); el.classList.add('excluded');
        });
      }
      updateColMeta();
    }
    function updateColMeta() {
      var sel=[];
      document.querySelectorAll('.col-toggle.active').forEach(function(t){ sel.push(t.getAttribute('data-col')); });
      Shiny.setInputValue('selected_params', sel, {priority:'event'});
      Shiny.setInputValue('active_col_count', sel.length, {priority:'event'});
    }

    function toggleVaso(safe_id) {
      var el = document.getElementById('v_'+safe_id);
      if (!el) return;
      var cur = el.getAttribute('data-sel');
      var newSel = cur==='1' ? '0' : '1';
      el.setAttribute('data-sel', newSel);
      var col = el.getAttribute('data-trt-col') || el.getAttribute('fill');
      if (newSel==='1') {
        el.setAttribute('fill', el.getAttribute('data-col')||el.getAttribute('fill'));
        el.setAttribute('stroke', el.getAttribute('data-col')||el.getAttribute('fill'));
        el.classList.remove('excl'); el.classList.add('sel');
      } else {
        el.setAttribute('fill', '#D1D5DB');
        el.setAttribute('stroke', '#9CA3AF');
        el.classList.remove('sel'); el.classList.add('excl');
      }
      var selected=[];
      document.querySelectorAll('.vaso.sel').forEach(function(v){ selected.push(v.getAttribute('data-unit')); });
      Shiny.setInputValue('selected_units', selected, {priority:'event'});
      updateMapStats();
    }
    function selectAllVasos() {
      document.querySelectorAll('.vaso').forEach(function(el) {
        el.setAttribute('data-sel','1');
        el.setAttribute('fill', el.getAttribute('data-col')||el.getAttribute('fill'));
        el.setAttribute('stroke', el.getAttribute('data-col')||el.getAttribute('fill'));
        el.classList.remove('excl'); el.classList.add('sel');
      });
      var selected=[];
      document.querySelectorAll('.vaso.sel').forEach(function(v){ selected.push(v.getAttribute('data-unit')); });
      Shiny.setInputValue('selected_units', selected, {priority:'event'});
      updateMapStats();
    }
    function deselectAllVasos() {
      document.querySelectorAll('.vaso').forEach(function(el) {
        el.setAttribute('data-sel','0');
        el.setAttribute('fill','#D1D5DB');
        el.setAttribute('stroke','#9CA3AF');
        el.classList.remove('sel'); el.classList.add('excl');
      });
      Shiny.setInputValue('selected_units', [], {priority:'event'});
      updateMapStats();
    }
    function updateMapStats() {
      var n_sel  = document.querySelectorAll('.vaso.sel').length;
      var n_excl = document.querySelectorAll('.vaso.excl').length;
      var el_sel  = document.getElementById('map-stat-sel');
      var el_excl = document.getElementById('map-stat-excl');
      if (el_sel)  el_sel.textContent  = n_sel;
      if (el_excl) el_excl.textContent = n_excl;
    }

    function togglePivot() {
      var el=document.getElementById('pivot-toggle');
      var on=el.classList.toggle('on');
      Shiny.setInputValue('pivot_long', on, {priority:'event'});
    }
    function toggleRibbon() {
      var el=document.getElementById('ribbon-toggle');
      var on=el.classList.toggle('on');
      Shiny.setInputValue('show_ribbon', on, {priority:'event'});
    }
    function toggleJitterBox() {
      var el=document.getElementById('jitter-box-toggle');
      var on=el.classList.toggle('on');
      Shiny.setInputValue('show_jitter_box', on, {priority:'event'});
    }
    function toggleChartParam(el) {
      el.classList.toggle('active'); el.classList.toggle('excluded');
      var sel=[];
      document.querySelectorAll('.chart-param-toggle.active').forEach(function(t){ sel.push(t.getAttribute('data-param')); });
      Shiny.setInputValue('chart_params', sel, {priority:'event'});
    }

    Shiny.addCustomMessageHandler('downloadCSV', function(msg) {
      var blob=new Blob([msg.content],{type:'text/csv;charset=utf-8;'});
      var link=document.createElement('a'); link.href=URL.createObjectURL(blob);
      link.download=msg.filename; document.body.appendChild(link); link.click(); document.body.removeChild(link);
    });
    Shiny.addCustomMessageHandler('downloadPNG', function(msg) {
      var link=document.createElement('a'); link.href='data:image/png;base64,'+msg.data;
      link.download=msg.filename; document.body.appendChild(link); link.click(); document.body.removeChild(link);
    });
    Shiny.addCustomMessageHandler('initMapColors', function(msg) {
      msg.units.forEach(function(item) {
        var el=document.getElementById('v_'+item.id);
        if (el) el.setAttribute('data-col', item.col);
      });
    });
    $(document).on('shiny:value', function(e) {
      if (e.name==='col_selector_panel') setTimeout(updateColMeta, 50);
      if (e.name==='map_panel') setTimeout(updateMapStats, 100);
    });
  ")),

  # ── Header ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  div(class="sx-card",
    div(style="display:flex;align-items:flex-start;justify-content:space-between;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.5rem;",
      div(div(class="app-title","CleanSpeX 🧹"), uiOutput("app_subtitle")),
      div(style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.8rem;",
        uiOutput("status_badge"),
        div(class="lang-switcher",
          tags$button(class="lang-btn", `data-lang`="it", onclick="setLang('it')", "IT"),
          tags$button(class="lang-btn active", `data-lang`="en", onclick="setLang('en')", "EN")
        )
      )
    )
  ),
  uiOutput("privacy_banner"),
  uiOutput("step1_panel"),
  uiOutput("col_selector_panel"),
  uiOutput("step3_panel"),
  uiOutput("map_panel"),
  uiOutput("chart_panel"),
  uiOutput("box_panel"),
  uiOutput("final_panel"),

  hr(class="section-divider"),
  div(style="text-align:center;font-size:.85rem;color:#6B7280;padding:.5rem 0 1.5rem;",
    uiOutput("app_credits"))
)

# ── Server ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
server <- function(input, output, session) {
  rv <- reactiveValues(
    df_raw=NULL, df_daily=NULL, df_final=NULL,
    params=NULL, trt_colors=NULL, map_df=NULL,
    error=NULL, base_name=NULL,
    chart_png_b64=NULL, chart_png_range=NULL, chart_png_box=NULL
  )

  lang <- reactive({ if (is.null(input$ui_lang)) "en" else input$ui_lang })
  t    <- reactive({ TR[[lang()]] })

  output$app_subtitle <- renderUI({
    p(class="app-subtitle", t()$app_subtitle, " ", tags$strong("PlantEye"), ".")
  })
  output$privacy_banner <- renderUI({
    tx <- t()
    div(class="privacy-banner",
      div(class="privacy-icon","🔒"),
      div(div(class="privacy-title", tx$privacy_title),
          p(class="privacy-body", tx$privacy_body)))
  })
  output$app_credits <- renderUI({
    cr <- t()$credits
    tagList(cr$pre,
      tags$a(href="https://www.mauromaver.eu", target="_blank",
             style="color:#2D6A4F;font-weight:700;text-decoration:underline;","Mauro Maver"),
      cr$bug,
      tags$a(href="https://github.com/Stramon1um", target="_blank",
             style="color:#2D6A4F;font-weight:600;text-decoration:underline;","GitHub"),
      cr$or,
      tags$a(href="mailto:mauro.maver@univr.it",
             style="color:#2D6A4F;font-weight:600;text-decoration:underline;", cr$mail),
      " \U0001F60A")
  })

  # ── Step 1 ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  output$step1_panel <- renderUI({
    tx <- t()
    div(class="sx-card", p(class="section-label", tx$step1),
      fileInput("file_in", label=NULL, accept=c(".csv","text/csv"),
                placeholder=tx$file_ph, buttonLabel=tx$file_btn),
      uiOutput("file_info_chip"))
  })

  observeEvent(input$file_in, {
    rv$df_raw <- rv$df_daily <- rv$df_final <- rv$params <- rv$trt_colors <-
      rv$map_df <- rv$error <- rv$chart_png_b64 <- rv$chart_png_range <- rv$chart_png_box <- NULL
    tryCatch({
      df <- parse_planteye(input$file_in$datapath)
      rv$df_raw   <- df
      rv$base_name <- sub("\\.csv$","", input$file_in$name, ignore.case=TRUE)
      p   <- classify_params(df)
      rv$params <- p
      rv$trt_colors <- make_trt_colors(df$treatment)
      rv$map_df <- unique(df[, c("unit","treatment","posX","posY")])
    }, error=function(e) rv$error <- conditionMessage(e))
  })

  output$file_info_chip <- renderUI({
    req(rv$df_raw)
    tx <- t()
    n_plants <- length(unique(rv$df_raw$unit))
    n_trts   <- length(unique(rv$df_raw$treatment))
    n_days   <- length(unique(rv$df_raw$date))
    div(class="file-chip" ,
        style="display:inline-block;font-size:.78rem;background:#EAF4EF;border:1px solid #C6E8D6;border-radius:4px;padding:.2rem .6rem;color:#2D6A4F;font-weight:600;margin-top:.5rem;",
        tx$file_info(nrow(rv$df_raw), n_plants, n_trts, n_days))
  })

  # ── Step 2: Selezione parametri ─────────────────────────────────────────────
  output$col_selector_panel <- renderUI({
    req(rv$params)
    tx <- t()
    p  <- rv$params
    pills_main <- lapply(p$main, function(col)
      tags$span(class="col-toggle active", `data-col`=col, onclick="toggleCol(this);", col))
    pills_dist <- lapply(p$dist, function(col)
      tags$span(class="col-toggle dist excluded", `data-col`=col, onclick="toggleCol(this);", col))

    div(class="sx-card", p(class="section-label", tx$step2),
      div(class="toggle-actions",
        tags$button(class="link-btn", onclick="setAllCols('main')", tx$sel_main),
        tags$button(class="link-btn", onclick="setAllCols('all')",  tx$sel_all),
        tags$button(class="link-btn", onclick="setAllCols('none')", tx$desel_all)
      ),
      div(class="col-grid", pills_main, pills_dist),
      p(style="font-size:.82rem;color:#6B7280;margin-top:.3rem;",
        span(id="col-count-active", length(p$main)), " / ",
        length(p$all), " ", tx$col_meta)
    )
  })

  # ── Step 3: Pulizia + riepilogo ─────────────────────────────────────────────
  output$step3_panel <- renderUI({
    req(rv$df_raw)
    tx <- t()
    div(class="sx-card", p(class="section-label", tx$step3),
      div(style="display:flex;gap:.8rem;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;",
        actionButton("clean_btn", tx$btn_process, icon=icon("gears"),
          style="border:none;color:#fff;font-weight:600;font-size:1rem;padding:.6rem 1.7rem;border-radius:6px;background:#2D6A4F;"),
        div(class="dl-wrap", uiOutput("dl_clean_ui"))
      ),
      uiOutput("summary_wrap")
    )
  })

  observeEvent(input$clean_btn, {
    req(rv$df_raw)
    rv$df_daily <- rv$df_final <- rv$chart_png_b64 <- rv$error <- NULL
    tryCatch({
      sel <- input$selected_params
      if (is.null(sel)||!length(sel)) sel <- rv$params$main
      rv$df_daily <- daily_mean_per_plant(rv$df_raw, sel)
    }, error=function(e) rv$error <- conditionMessage(e))
  })

  output$dl_clean_ui <- renderUI({
    req(rv$df_daily)
    div(class="dl-wrap",
      actionButton("dl_clean_btn", t()$btn_dl_clean, icon=icon("download")))
  })
  observeEvent(input$dl_clean_btn, {
    req(rv$df_daily)
    session$sendCustomMessage("downloadCSV", list(
      filename=paste0(rv$base_name, "_clean.csv"),
      content=df_to_csv_string(rv$df_daily)))
  })

  output$summary_wrap <- renderUI({
    req(rv$df_daily)
    tx <- t()
    df <- rv$df_daily
    div(
      hr(class="section-divider"),
      div(class="stats-strip",
        div(class="stat-item", span(class="stat-val", length(unique(df$unit))), span(class="stat-lbl", tx$stat_plants)),
        div(class="stat-item", span(class="stat-val", length(unique(df$treatment))), span(class="stat-lbl", tx$stat_trts)),
        div(class="stat-item", span(class="stat-val", length(unique(df$date))), span(class="stat-lbl", tx$stat_days)),
        div(class="stat-item", span(class="stat-val", ncol(df)-6), span(class="stat-lbl", tx$stat_params)),
        div(class="stat-item", span(class="stat-val", paste0(rv$base_name,"_clean.csv")), span(class="stat-lbl", tx$stat_file))
      ),
      div(class="preview-wrap", tableOutput("preview_tbl"))
    )
  })
  output$preview_tbl <- renderTable({
    req(rv$df_daily)
    df <- rv$df_daily
    disp_cols <- c("unit","date","treatment","posX","posY",
                   intersect(rv$params$main[1:min(4,length(rv$params$main))], colnames(df)))
    df[, disp_cols[disp_cols %in% colnames(df)], drop=FALSE]
  }, striped=FALSE, hover=TRUE, bordered=FALSE, spacing="xs", na="")

  # ── Step 4: Mappa spaziale ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
  output$map_panel <- renderUI({
    req(rv$map_df, rv$trt_colors)
    tx    <- t()
    mdf   <- rv$map_df
    n_sel <- nrow(mdf)
    is_dark <- isTRUE(input$dark_mode)
    svg_html <- make_bench_svg(mdf, rv$trt_colors,
                                selected_units = mdf$unit,
                                is_dark = is_dark)
    init_js <- tags$script(HTML(paste0(
      "setTimeout(function(){\n",
      paste(sprintf("  var e=document.getElementById('v_%s'); if(e) e.setAttribute('data-col','%s');",
                    gsub(":","_",mdf$unit), rv$trt_colors[mdf$treatment]), collapse="\n"),
      "\n  Shiny.setInputValue('selected_units',",
      paste0("[", paste0('"', mdf$unit, '"', collapse=","), "]"),
      ",{priority:'event'});\n}, 200);"
    )))

    div(class="sx-card",
      p(class="section-label", tx$step4),
      p(class="map-hint", tx$map_hint),
      div(style="display:flex;gap:.8rem;",
        tags$button(class="link-btn", onclick="selectAllVasos()",   tx$btn_sel_all),
        tags$button(class="link-btn", onclick="deselectAllVasos()", tx$btn_desel_all)
      ),
      div(class="map-wrap", HTML(svg_html)),
      init_js,
      div(class="map-stats",
        span(class="map-stat-sel", id="map-stat-sel", n_sel), " ", tx$map_selected, " · ",
        span(class="map-stat-excl", id="map-stat-excl", "0"), " ", tx$map_excluded
      )
    )
  })

  # ── Step 5: Grafico temporale ───────────────────────────────────────────────
  output$chart_panel <- renderUI({
    req(rv$df_daily, rv$trt_colors)
    tx    <- t()
    df    <- rv$df_daily
    dates <- sort(unique(df$date))
    n     <- length(dates)
    avail <- get_available_chart_params(df, rv$params$main)
    if (!length(avail)) return(NULL)

    pills <- lapply(avail, function(p)
      tags$span(class="chart-param-toggle active", `data-param`=p,
                onclick="toggleChartParam(this);", p))

    div(class="sx-card",
      p(class="section-label", tx$step5),
      p(style="font-size:.82rem;color:#6B7280;margin-bottom:1rem;", tx$chart_hint),
      p(style="font-size:.82rem;color:#6B7280;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:.5rem;", tx$chart_param_lbl),
      div(class="chart-param-grid", pills),
      div(id="ribbon-toggle", class="pivot-toggle on", onclick="toggleRibbon();",
        div(class="pivot-switch"),
        div(div(class="pivot-label", tx$ribbon_label),
            div(class="pivot-sub",   tx$ribbon_sub))
      ),
      # ── Slicer date integrato ─────────────────────────────────────────────
      hr(class="section-divider", style="margin:.8rem 0;"),
      p(style="font-size:.82rem;color:#6B7280;margin-bottom:.8rem;", tx$range_hint),
      div(style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:1.2rem;margin-bottom:.8rem;",
        div(
          tags$label(style="font-size:.8rem;font-weight:600;color:#6B7280;display:block;margin-bottom:.3rem;",
                     tx$range_start),
          tags$input(type="range", id="range_start_idx", min=1, max=n, value=1, step=1,
                     style="width:100%;accent-color:#2D6A4F;", oninput="updateRangeLabel()")
        ),
        div(
          tags$label(style="font-size:.8rem;font-weight:600;color:#6B7280;display:block;margin-bottom:.3rem;",
                     tx$range_end),
          tags$input(type="range", id="range_end_idx", min=1, max=n, value=n, step=1,
                     style="width:100%;accent-color:#2D6A4F;", oninput="updateRangeLabel()")
        )
      ),
      div(style="font-size:.85rem;color:#374151;margin-bottom:1rem;background:#F3F4F6;border-radius:6px;padding:.5rem 1rem;display:inline-block;",
        span(id="range_label", paste(format(dates[1],"%d %b %Y"), "→", format(dates[n],"%d %b %Y")))
      ),
      tags$script(HTML(sprintf("
        var _dates_range = %s;
        function updateRangeLabel() {
          var i0 = parseInt(document.getElementById('range_start_idx').value)-1;
          var i1 = parseInt(document.getElementById('range_end_idx').value)-1;
          if (i0 > i1) { var tmp=i0; i0=i1; i1=tmp; }
          document.getElementById('range_label').textContent =
            _dates_range[i0] + ' \u2192 ' + _dates_range[i1];
          Shiny.setInputValue('range_start_idx', i0+1, {priority:'event'});
          Shiny.setInputValue('range_end_idx',   i1+1, {priority:'event'});
        }
        updateRangeLabel();
      ", jsonlite_like_array_r(format(dates, "%d %b %Y"))))),
      # ── Pulsanti ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
      div(style="display:flex;gap:.8rem;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;",
        actionButton("chart_btn", tx$btn_chart, icon=icon("chart-line"),
          style="border:none;color:#fff;font-weight:600;font-size:1rem;padding:.6rem 1.7rem;border-radius:6px;background:#0E7490;"),
        uiOutput("dl_png_ui"),
        uiOutput("clear_chart_ui")
      ),
      uiOutput("chart_render_wrap")
    )
  })

  observeEvent(input$chart_btn, {
    req(rv$df_daily, rv$trt_colors)
    rv$chart_png_b64 <- rv$error <- NULL
    sel_units <- input$selected_units
    if (is.null(sel_units)||!length(sel_units)) { rv$error <- t()$chart_no_trt; return() }
    sel_params <- input$chart_params
    if (is.null(sel_params)||!length(sel_params))
      sel_params <- get_available_chart_params(rv$df_daily, rv$params$main)
    if (!length(sel_params)) return()
    tryCatch({
      dates <- sort(unique(rv$df_daily$date))
      i0    <- max(1, min(as.integer(input$range_start_idx %||% 1),         length(dates)))
      i1    <- max(1, min(as.integer(input$range_end_idx   %||% length(dates)), length(dates)))
      if (i0 > i1) { tmp <- i0; i0 <- i1; i1 <- tmp }
      sub <- rv$df_daily[rv$df_daily$date %in% dates[i0:i1] & rv$df_daily$unit %in% sel_units,]
      trt_day <- agg_trt_day(sub, sel_params, unique(sub$unit))
      if (is.null(trt_day)||!nrow(trt_day)) return()
      show_ribbon <- if (is.null(input$show_ribbon)) TRUE else isTRUE(input$show_ribbon)
      n_p <- length(sel_params); n_col <- if (n_p>1) 2 else 1; n_row <- ceiling(n_p/n_col)
      tmpf <- tempfile(fileext=".png")
      png(tmpf, width=5.5*n_col, height=5*n_row, units="in", res=300)
      draw_time_chart(trt_day, sel_params, rv$trt_colors, show_ribbon=show_ribbon, ylab=t()$chart_ylab)
      dev.off()
      raw_bytes <- readBin(tmpf, "raw", file.info(tmpf)$size)
      rv$chart_png_b64 <- base64_encode_raw(raw_bytes)
      unlink(tmpf)
    }, error=function(e) rv$error <- conditionMessage(e))
  })

  `%||%` <- function(a, b) if (is.null(a)) b else a

  output$chart_render_wrap <- renderUI({
    req(rv$chart_png_b64)
    div(class="chart-wrap",
      tags$img(src=paste0("data:image/png;base64,", rv$chart_png_b64)))
  })
  output$dl_png_ui <- renderUI({
    req(rv$chart_png_b64)
    div(class="dl-wrap", actionButton("dl_png_btn", t()$btn_dl_png, icon=icon("image")))
  })
  output$clear_chart_ui <- renderUI({
    req(rv$chart_png_b64)
    tags$button(class="link-btn", style="color:#9CA3AF;",
      onclick="Shiny.setInputValue('clear_chart', Math.random(), {priority:'event'});",
      icon("xmark"), " ", t()$btn_clear)
  })
  observeEvent(input$dl_png_btn, {
    req(rv$chart_png_b64)
    session$sendCustomMessage("downloadPNG", list(
      filename=paste0(rv$base_name,"_chart.png"), data=rv$chart_png_b64))
  })
  observeEvent(input$clear_chart, { rv$chart_png_b64 <- NULL })

  # ── Step 5b: Boxplot su data singola ─────────────────────────────────────────
  output$box_panel <- renderUI({
    req(rv$df_daily, rv$trt_colors)
    tx    <- t()
    dates <- sort(unique(rv$df_daily$date))
    n     <- length(dates)
    mid   <- ceiling(n/2)

    div(class="sx-card",
      p(class="section-label", tx$box_title),
      p(style="font-size:.82rem;color:#6B7280;margin-bottom:1.2rem;", tx$box_hint),
      div(style="margin-bottom:.8rem;",
        tags$label(style="font-size:.8rem;font-weight:600;color:#6B7280;display:block;margin-bottom:.3rem;",
                   tx$box_date_lbl),
        tags$input(type="range", id="box_date_idx", min=1, max=n, value=mid, step=1,
                   style="width:100%;max-width:500px;accent-color:#7C3AED;",
                   oninput="updateBoxLabel()")
      ),
      div(style="font-size:.85rem;color:#374151;margin-bottom:1rem;background:#F3F4F6;border-radius:6px;padding:.5rem 1rem;display:inline-block;",
        span(id="box_label", format(dates[mid], "%d %b %Y"))
      ),
      tags$script(HTML(sprintf("
        var _dates_box = %s;
        function updateBoxLabel() {
          var i = parseInt(document.getElementById('box_date_idx').value)-1;
          document.getElementById('box_label').textContent = _dates_box[i];
          Shiny.setInputValue('box_date_idx', i+1, {priority:'event'});
        }
        updateBoxLabel();
      ", jsonlite_like_array_r(format(dates, "%d %b %Y"))))),
      div(id="jitter-box-toggle", class="pivot-toggle", onclick="toggleJitterBox();",
        div(class="pivot-switch"),
        div(div(class="pivot-label", tx$jitter_label),
            div(class="pivot-sub",   tx$jitter_sub))
      ),
      div(style="display:flex;gap:.8rem;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;",
        actionButton("box_chart_btn", tx$btn_box_chart, icon=icon("chart-bar"),
          style="border:none;color:#fff;font-weight:600;font-size:1rem;padding:.6rem 1.7rem;border-radius:6px;background:#7C3AED;"),
        uiOutput("dl_box_ui"),
        uiOutput("clear_box_ui")
      ),
      uiOutput("box_chart_wrap")
    )
  })

  observeEvent(input$box_chart_btn, {
    req(rv$df_daily, rv$trt_colors)
    rv$chart_png_box <- rv$error <- NULL
    tryCatch({
      dates <- sort(unique(rv$df_daily$date))
      idx   <- max(1, min(as.integer(input$box_date_idx %||% ceiling(length(dates)/2)), length(dates)))
      sel_date  <- dates[idx]
      sub       <- rv$df_daily
      sel_units <- input$selected_units
      if (!is.null(sel_units)&&length(sel_units)) sub <- sub[sub$unit %in% sel_units,]
      sel_params <- input$chart_params
      if (is.null(sel_params)||!length(sel_params))
        sel_params <- get_available_chart_params(rv$df_daily, rv$params$main)
      n_p <- length(sel_params); n_col <- if (n_p>1) 2 else 1; n_row <- ceiling(n_p/n_col)
      tmpf <- tempfile(fileext=".png")
      png(tmpf, width=5.5*n_col, height=5*n_row, units="in", res=300)
      draw_boxplot_day(sub, sel_params, rv$trt_colors, selected_date=sel_date,
                        ylab=t()$chart_ylab,
                        show_jitter=isTRUE(input$show_jitter_box))
      dev.off()
      raw_bytes <- readBin(tmpf, "raw", file.info(tmpf)$size)
      rv$chart_png_box <- base64_encode_raw(raw_bytes)
      unlink(tmpf)
    }, error=function(e) rv$error <- conditionMessage(e))
  })

  output$dl_box_ui <- renderUI({
    req(rv$chart_png_box)
    div(class="dl-wrap", actionButton("dl_box_btn", t()$btn_dl_box, icon=icon("image")))
  })
  output$clear_box_ui <- renderUI({
    req(rv$chart_png_box)
    tags$button(class="link-btn", style="color:#9CA3AF;",
      onclick="Shiny.setInputValue('clear_box', Math.random(), {priority:'event'});",
      icon("xmark"), " ", t()$btn_clear_box)
  })
  observeEvent(input$dl_box_btn, {
    req(rv$chart_png_box)
    session$sendCustomMessage("downloadPNG", list(
      filename=paste0(rv$base_name,"_boxplot.png"), data=rv$chart_png_box))
  })
  output$box_chart_wrap <- renderUI({
    req(rv$chart_png_box)
    div(class="chart-wrap",
      tags$img(src=paste0("data:image/png;base64,", rv$chart_png_box)))
  })
  observeEvent(input$clear_box, { rv$chart_png_box <- NULL })

  # ── Step 6: Export finale ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  output$final_panel <- renderUI({
    req(rv$df_daily)
    tx <- t()
    div(class="sx-card", p(class="section-label", tx$step6),
      div(id="pivot-toggle", class="pivot-toggle", onclick="togglePivot();",
        div(class="pivot-switch"),
        div(div(class="pivot-label", tx$pivot_label),
            div(class="pivot-sub",   tx$pivot_sub))
      ),
      div(style="display:flex;gap:.8rem;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;",
        actionButton("pivot_btn", tx$btn_final, icon=icon("file-csv"),
          style="border:none;color:#fff;font-weight:700;font-size:.95rem;padding:.58rem 1.6rem;border-radius:6px;background:#7C3AED;"),
        div(class="dl-wrap", uiOutput("dl_final_ui"))
      ),
      uiOutput("final_preview_wrap")
    )
  })

  observeEvent(input$pivot_btn, {
    req(rv$df_daily)
    rv$df_final <- rv$error <- NULL
    tryCatch({
      sel_units <- input$selected_units
      df <- if (!is.null(sel_units)&&length(sel_units))
              rv$df_daily[rv$df_daily$unit %in% sel_units,]
            else rv$df_daily
      sel_params <- if (!is.null(input$selected_params)&&length(input$selected_params))
                      input$selected_params else rv$params$main
      sel_params <- sel_params[sel_params %in% colnames(df)]
      rv$df_final <- if (isTRUE(input$pivot_long)) pivot_long_pe(df, sel_params) else df
    }, error=function(e) rv$error <- conditionMessage(e))
  })

  output$dl_final_ui <- renderUI({
    req(rv$df_final)
    div(class="dl-wrap", actionButton("dl_final_btn", t()$btn_dl_final, icon=icon("download")))
  })
  observeEvent(input$dl_final_btn, {
    req(rv$df_final)
    session$sendCustomMessage("downloadCSV", list(
      filename=paste0(rv$base_name,"_final.csv"),
      content=df_to_csv_string(rv$df_final)))
  })

  output$final_preview_wrap <- renderUI({
    req(rv$df_final)
    tx <- t()
    tagList(
      hr(class="section-divider"),
      div(class="stats-strip",
        div(class="stat-item", span(class="stat-val", nrow(rv$df_final)), span(class="stat-lbl", tx$stat_rows)),
        div(class="stat-item", span(class="stat-val", ncol(rv$df_final)), span(class="stat-lbl", tx$stat_params)),
        div(class="stat-item", span(class="stat-val", if(isTRUE(input$pivot_long))"long" else "wide"), span(class="stat-lbl", tx$stat_format))
      ),
      p(class="section-label", tx$final_preview),
      div(class="preview-wrap", tableOutput("final_preview_tbl"))
    )
  })
  output$final_preview_tbl <- renderTable({
    req(rv$df_final); rv$df_final
  }, striped=FALSE, hover=TRUE, bordered=FALSE, spacing="xs", na="")

  # ── Badge stato ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  output$status_badge <- renderUI({
    tx <- t()
    if (!is.null(rv$error))         div(class="status-badge badge-error", tx$status_error)
    else if (!is.null(rv$df_final)) div(class="status-badge badge-ok",   tx$status_chart)
    else if (!is.null(rv$chart_png_b64)) div(class="status-badge badge-ok", tx$status_chart)
    else if (!is.null(rv$df_daily)) div(class="status-badge badge-ok",   tx$status_clean)
    else if (!is.null(rv$df_raw))   div(class="status-badge badge-ok",   tx$status_loaded)
    else                             div(class="status-badge badge-idle", tx$status_waiting)
  })
}

shinyApp(ui, server)
```
